title: KTRIO Large Gaming Mouse Pad with Stitched Edges, Extended Mousepad with Superior Micro-Weave Cloth, Non-Slip Base, Water Resist Keyboard Pad, Desk Pad for Gamer, Office & Home, 35.4 x 15.7 in, Black
description: 35.4 x 15.7 Inch Extended Size: This XXX-Large mouse pad provides ample room to fit your gaming mouse, full-size mechanical keyboard, and other desk items. Keep your desk clean and uncluttered with the freedom to configure your setup as desired. Perfect for gamers who use a lower DPI or need more room to maneuver. Highly Durable Design: Frayed edges and low-quality materials are problems many gamers are familiar with. The Ktrio anti-fray mousepad addresses these issues with an advanced cloth textile chosen only after countless hours of testing. Stitching along the edges of the surface ensure it will never fray or peel. Superior Control Surface: Ktrio extended mouse pad adopts textured micro-weave cloth surface on cover with enhanced command to provide the excellent balance between glide and control. The performance-tuned surface optimizes mouse tracking accuracy for both optical and laser sensors. Non-slip Rubber Base: The soft and dense non-skid nature rubber base keeps this desk pad firmly in place. This large mouse mat remains uniformly flat even over imperfect surfaces. Just immerse into your work or games without worrying about the annoying mouse pad movement. Water-resistant Coating: Spilled drinks or accidents are no match for the spill-proof coating that makes liquids slide right off the surface. Easy to clean with a damp cloth.

reviews.title: Strong Plastic Smell!
reviews.text: The mat looks fine, and the size is perfect for my C shaped table, I really wanted to keep it. However, it came with super strong plastic smell, and it’s been a few days since I received it, the smell is still there. I rolled it back and repacked it to send it back, after this, that smell just stayed on my hands for a while, no matter how many times I have washed my hands with soap. I’m returning it!

reviews.title: Great quality for the price
reviews.text: I purchased this mainly to use on my laptop/bed tray table.  I use the table to do drawings in graphite and colored pencils.  Because of the material of the surface of this bed tray, it’s a little difficult to clean.  This fits it perfectly and is definitely much easier for clean up and keeps my bed tray looking pristine.  You can use either side.  They are both equally easy to clean. The desk mat is thick and has the brand name embossed in the right  lower corner of the product.  It’s really well made for the price.  I think it will hold up well for a long time.  Very happy the quality of the product!

reviews.title: My Marvelous Memo-Mouse Pad
reviews.text: This is a non-caffeinated mood booster and a great way to start your day. Essentially a memo pad attached to a mouse pad it is bright and fun.the paper is decent quality and there is enough room to create lists, jot notes and messages. While the mouse pad is not impressive, it functions. My mouse worked on it although perhaps not as smoothly as with designated mouse pads. This would be a great gift for a student or office drone.

reviews.title: More of a "note pad" than a "mouse pad" for me.
reviews.text: This is a funny “mouse pad”. . .. for me it’s more of a “note pad” and less of a “mouse pad”.  There is a slot for our “awesome” pen at the top.  An “awesome” pen is not included, and you will need to use your own.  Perhaps it should have been included for $12.00 Made in China.  Depending upon the pen you use, it could either be a pain to remove. . or. . not fit. . . nonetheless, that part is really no big deal to me.  For me it’s just a “fun” item and I use it to take notes.

reviews.title: Smells horrible
reviews.text:
It's comfortable and looks good, but it smells horrible. I'm speaking of an extremely strong chemical smell. The smell is akin to a mix of fresh paint with mold. It emanates from the backside that is made out of some type of non-slip material, which is covered by plastic. Once you peel it off the smell hits you right in the nose. I'll leave it outside with the backside up to see if it goes away over time. If it doesn't, I'll have to throw it away.

Update: The smell never went away completely so I decided to toss it out. I am disappointed that an otherwise fine product went to waste because of the bizarre smell that came with it.
reviews.author: AEX4GECDHGOYWW4G7PPX3P4FMP6A

reviews.title: good grip, comfortable wrist pad, mouse works well with it; no skipping, nor cursor loss
reviews.text:
I'm enjoying this mouse pad. It isn't fancy; but it is comfortable and it does the job.

--My mouse curser works well with it. No issues with skipping.
-- The material is soft and smooth on top, and has a grippy rubber backside--and this does not budge.
--Wrist support is like a comfy pillow for the wrist.
--The edging isn't perfect but it doesn't interfere.
-- The pad doesn't lay perfectly flat- maybe it will take several days to relax, but right now it has a light lift along the wrist side. It doesn't impede use, comfort, or overall look. Just as a reviewer I look for those details to share.
--The mouse pad seems typical in size for this ilk. I use it alongside my lap top which I use for basic browsing and writing. I say that because I dont need to move my mouse all over the place.
-- I would not use this for gaming. For that, I have a very large desk/mouse pad. So just know what you are getting this for.
reviews.author: AF2BLE54TEMGZ546U763ZHZRXC4A

reviews.title: WORKS AND FITS PERFECT!
reviews.text: I am using this right now as I keyboard!  I have a computer touch screen, but I like to use a keyboard.  So the mouse fits on the Mouse Mat.  I can fit the wrist perfectly during usage of the mouse.  It is well-cushioned,  and very attractive color.  There is plenty of space for the mouse itself.  Great Mouse Pad!  Nice padded cushion!

reviews.title: Doesn't tear up like my other one
reviews.text:
I had gotten a different pad early in the year and almost immediately it started tearing with my mouse.

This one has some scratches on it but nothing like the other one had at this point.
Plus I made the mistake of getting a white pad before and when I returned to the office, my coworker mentioned how disgusting it looked from just regular dirt, it was unwashable.
So I got a black one, problem solved.

Of course, I didn't love the branding on the pad so I used a sharpie marker to try to eliminate it, it covered it up slightly, but it's still visible, like a grey on the black.
reviews.author: AEPEDW5FBBJ2XYR2BIJAKUPHCMHA

reviews.title: Comfortable to use; nicely sized
reviews.text:
I'm pretty pleased with this mouse pad. It's similar in design to others I've used with the exception being that the wrist support is very cushy and soft. It allows my wrist to sink into the pad, but has enough firmness to provide support and keep my wrist from bending or getting strained while mousing. It's much more comfortable and effective than the pads that have a harder, firmer wrist support.

The material on the pad allows the mouse to glide easily, and the backside of the pad has a very effective non-slip coating. It's thick enough to have a substantial feel. I wasn't all that enthused about the pink color at first, but it's grown on me. It's certainly a different (and welcome) change from the usual beige office décor.

All in all, a very good mouse pad with an effective wrist support design. Five stars.
reviews.author: AG63W2BMC4HRP76AMS36AYY64AHA

reviews.title: Basic mouse pad that works as expected
reviews.text: There’s not a lot for me to say about this mouse pad. It’s pretty much exactly what I expected it to be. The mouse pad is a beautiful color and looks just like the picture. The mouse runs across it smoothly just as it should. The wrist rest is fine as well. Nothing spectacular, but it does what it’s supposed to do--it supports my wrist when using the mouse.
reviews.author: AHT5CUJ2KRJ442O7HTMURJJRFK5Q

reviews.title: What A Difference Typing With No Pain Makes!
reviews.text: YXLILI Ergonomic Mouse Wrist Rest Pad Memory Foam Wrist Support Mat Pillow Rest Cushion Gaming Mousepad with Non-Slip Base for Easy Typing & Pain Relief Working Gaming saves my wrist and arm from pain. I have been using this mousepad for a week now, as it has taken me this long to get used to the extra cushion against my wrist. Once I got used to it, those tiny bruises from the table edge are finally beginning to disappear. What a difference typing with no pain makes! The pillow is soft, yet firm for wrist support. The bottom does not move or slide and the mouse side works great! This is a must have if you type a lot and work on photos with my mouse all day like me. It will take a while to get use to not being in pain all day from the table edge! Wonderful comfort! 5 STARS.
reviews.author: AENQC6O3X4BUEQWSDTBUN2VMM5VQ
